name: Banana Pudding Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Small, instant banana jello pudding mix (dry)
recipeInstructions: This recipe won first place in 1962 as a 4-H project for the Great Western Dairy Show in Inglewood, CA. Using a blender or mixer, stir cream cheese until very soft. Gradually blend in 1/2 cup of milk until smooth and creamy. Add remaining milk and the pudding mix. Beat slowly on low for 1 minute (do not over beat). Pour into cool Graham Cracker Crust. Sprinkle extra graham cracker crust crumbs on top if desired. Chill.
